com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.internal.diff.DiffWriter

Package Description
com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.internal.diff  

  • Uses of DiffWriter in com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.internal.diff

    Classes in com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.internal.diff that implement DiffWriter 
    Modifier and Type Class Description
    class  TextOnly
    A diff writer that does not use ANSI escape codes.
    class  Writer16Colors
    A terminal that supports 16 colors.
    class  Writer16MillionColors
    A terminal that supports 16 million colors.
    class  Writer256Colors
    A terminal that supports a 256 color palette.
    class  Writer8Colors
    A terminal that supports an 8 colors.
